single: Compute the signed boundary work for the constant-pressure piston process. Use W = P x (V_final - V_initial) and 1 MPa x L = 1 kJ.
Using the initial and final state labels, what signed integer boundary work is done by the gas in kJ?
For this constant-pressure process, calculate P times the change in volume. Expansion is positive and compression is negative.
Read P, V_i, and V_f from the diagram. What is the signed boundary work in kJ?
What integer value gives the gas boundary work for the shown piston-cylinder process?

scene:piston_cylinder_apparatus.object_description: a piston-cylinder apparatus shown in initial and final states, with constant pressure in MPa, initial and final volumes in liters, and a process arrow

query:single.answer_hint: set "answer" to the signed integer boundary work in kJ, using work done by the gas as positive
query:single.annotation_hint: set "annotation" to an object with keys "pressure_readout", "initial_cylinder", and "final_cylinder", each mapped to one [x0,y0,x1,y1] pixel box
